output.theme: A derelict, overgrown botanical research facility where nature has reclaimed the quiet halls, creating a serene but unsettling horror atmosphere.

encounters.trigger: Opening the main atrium gate alerts the facility's security system to initiate containment.

pickup.name: Botanical Solvent
pickup.effect: Corrosive substance capable of dissolving thick vine barriers and hardening shells.

encounters.hazard: Toxic pollen clouds that drain health over time.

encounters.trigger: Disturbing the central flower display activates the Stalker hidden in the rafters.

pickup.name: Refractive Prism
pickup.effect: Amplifies light sources, allowing the Warden to stun shadow-based entities.

encounters.hazard: Slippery moss flooring that reduces movement speed.

encounters.trigger: Clearing the last filter activates the lab's main reactor, summoning the final guardian.

pickup.name: Ancient Sunlight Core
pickup.effect: A radiant energy cell required to override the boss room security.

encounters.hazard: Electrified water pools that deal damage if stepped in.

output.objective: Navigate the facility and purge the corrupted bio-matter blocking the main exit.

boss.name: The Arboretum Sovereign
boss.victory_condition: Overload the Sovereign's shield with the Ancient Sunlight Core, then deliver the final strike.

output.reward: The Warden's Sigil, granting permanent regeneration of light energy.

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Sentinel clears the jamming sequence on the final chronosphere door.

boss.name: The Grand Horologist
boss.victory_condition: Channel temporal energy to rewind the boss's primary engine while shields are down.

normalized.objective: Repair the fractured timeline by reaching the central Chronosphere before the city collapses.
normalized.reward: The ability to manipulate time at will and save the city from its loop.

encounters.trigger: Pulling the rusty steam valve that releases pressurized gas into the next corridor.

pickup.name: Condenser Coil
pickup.effect: Absorbs electrical discharge

encounters.trigger: Stepping on a pressure plate that illuminates the path to the main boiler room.

pickup.name: Superheated Piston Head
pickup.effect: Infuses earth magic with immense thermal energy

encounters.trigger: Inserting the forged key into the central furnace lock.

pickup.name: Chronos Key Fragment
pickup.effect: Slows time for clockwork mechanisms

encounters.hazard: Unstable floor panels collapsing into lava

output.objective: Deactivate the Chronos Engine before it tears reality apart.

boss.name: The Grand Clockwork Architect
boss.victory_condition: Use the Chronos Key Fragment to freeze the boss's internal gears and shatter its chassis.

output.setting: An underground steampunk facility filled with decaying Victorian brass and menacing steam-powered machinery.

normalized.setting: An underground steampunk facility filled with decaying Victorian brass and menacing steam-powered machinery.

normalized.objective: Deactivate the Chronos Engine before it tears reality apart.

encounters.trigger: Defeating the sprite causes it to drop a golden gear that unlocks the gate to the Steam-Pipe Corridor.

pickup.name: Polished Lens
pickup.effect: Reveals hidden steam pressure valves in dark areas.

encounters.trigger: Deactivating the automaton reveals the maintenance hatch leading to the Boiler Core.

pickup.name: Conductive Oil
pickup.effect: Increases electrical damage when applied to weapon.

encounters.hazard: Rotating giant cogwheels on the floor.

enemy.name: Copper Guardian
enemy.weakness: Conductive Oil applied to Aether-Infused Mace

encounters.trigger: The Guardian's collapse powers up the primary elevator to the Celestial Spire boss arena.

pickup.name: Focusing Crystal
pickup.effect: Magnifies damage against steam-based machinery.

output.objective: Restore the flow of the Great Clockwork to bring peace to the sanctuary.

boss.name: High Engineer Aethelred
boss.weakness: Focusing Crystal (used to overload his boiler suit)
boss.victory_condition: Overload the boss's boiler suit to force a peaceful surrender.

output.setting: An abandoned, tranquil steam-powered research facility high in the clouds.
output.reward: The Chronos Key, granting control over local time flow.
